summary: Dashboard polish with quotes, compact metrics, header cloud sync, and weather permission flow.

introduced: Quote of the day on the Dashboard — one of 1,000 wishful quotes rotates after each analysis
First-open location prompt for weather; Today's weather stays hidden if you choose Not Now
Resource usage card sits beside unread, chat, passwords, and bills in one compact metric row
changed: Cloud sync moved to the top-right of the Dashboard beside the greeting
Analysis timing and Analyze Now sit on one line beside the daily quote
Password clipboard notifications show once for 45 seconds instead of reposting every few seconds
fixed: WeatherKit failures now show a clearer message and Try Again instead of a generic unavailable state
WeatherKit entitlement added to development entitlements for Debug builds
